title: I can’t help rooting for tiny open source AI model maker Arcee
description: Arcee is a tiny 26-person U.S. startup that built a high-performing, massive, open source LLM. And it's gaining popularity with OpenClaw users.

title: Firmus, the ‘Southgate’ AI data center builder backed by Nvidia, hits $5.5B valuation
description: Nvidia-backed Asia AI data center provider Firmus has now raised $1.35 billion in six months.

title: Intel signs on to Elon Musk’s Terafab chips project
description: Intel will join SpaceX and Tesla in an effort to build a new U.S. semiconductor factory in Texas, although the scope of its contributions are unclear.

title: Anthropic debuts preview of powerful new AI model Mythos in new cybersecurity initiative
description: The new model will be used by a small number of high-profile companies to engage in defensive cybersecurity work.

title: Uber is the latest to be won over by Amazon’s AI chips
description: Uber is expanding its AWS contract to run more of its ride-sharing features on Amazon's chips. This is a thumb-of-the nose at Oracle and Google.

title: Anthropic ups compute deal with Google and Broadcom amid skyrocketing demand
description: Anthropic bulked up its compute deal with Google and Broadcom as the company has seen its run-rate revenue surge to $30 billion.

title: Google Maps can now write captions for your photos using AI
description: Google is rolling out new features to make it easier for users to contribute local knowledge to Maps. Most notably, Gemini can now create captions when users are looking to share a photo or video about a place.

title: 4 days left to save close to $500 on TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 passes
description: Four days left to save up to $482 on your TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 ticket. These low rates will disappear on April 10 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register now.

title: The AI gold rush is pulling private wealth into riskier, earlier bets
description: On a recent episode of Equity, we talked to Arena Private Wealth to explore a growing trend: family offices bypassing VCs to gain direct exposure to AI startups, turning them from passive investors into active participants.

title: AI startup Rocket offers vibe McKinsey-style reports at a fraction of the cost
description: Rocket's new AI platform combines strategy, product building, and competitive intelligence, aiming to move beyond code generation.

title: OpenAI alums have been quietly investing from a new, potentially $100M fund
description: Zero Shot, a new venture capital fund with deep ties to OpenAI, is aiming to raise $100 million for its first fund. It has already written some checks.

title: Google quietly launched an AI dictation app that works offline
description: Google's new offline-first dictation app uses Gemma AI models to take on the apps like Wispr Flow.

title: Iran threatens ‘Stargate’ AI data centers
description: Iran said it will target U.S.-linked data centers with new missile strikes, as the war between the U.S. and Iran escalates.

title: OpenAI’s vision for the AI economy: public wealth funds, robot taxes, and a four-day workweek
description: OpenAI proposes taxes on AI profits, public wealth funds, and expanded safety nets to address job loss and inequality, blending redistribution with capitalism as policymakers debate AI’s economic impact.

title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications open: a chance for VC access, TechCrunch coverage, and $100K
description: Nominate your startup, or one you know that deserves the spotlight, and finish the process by applying. Selected 200 have a chance at VC access, TechCrunch coverage, and $100K for Startup Battlefield 200. Applications close on May 27.

title: How to use the new ChatGPT app integrations, including DoorDash, Spotify, Uber, and others
description: Learn how to use Spotify, Canva, Figma, Expedia, and other apps directly in ChatGPT.

title: Ticket savings of up to $500 this week for TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
description: Starting today, you have 5 days to save nearly $500 on your ticket to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026. This offer disappears Friday, April 10, at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register here to secure these low rates.

title: Spain’s Xoople raises $130 million Series B to map the Earth for AI
description: The company is also announcing a deal with L3Harris to build the sensors for Xoople's spacecraft.

title: Copilot is ‘for entertainment purposes only,’ according to Microsoft’s terms of use
description: AI skeptics aren’t the only ones warning users not to unthinkingly trust models’ outputs — that’s what the AI companies say themselves in their terms of service.

title: Can orbital data centers help justify a massive valuation for SpaceX?
description: On the latest episode of TechCrunch’s Equity podcast, we debated Elon Musk's vision for data centers in space.
